2186030.name: Deviant-X
2186030.description:
Set in a time when the intelligent machines have taken over everything but wanted more;

In a bid to harness the power of the human mind, an all-powerful AI lured and trapped everyone within the cyber realm.

The Deviants are a very rare set of people in this realm that have evolved to become unaffected by the mind control of the all-powerful AI.

You play as a deviant in this world as you set out to put an end to this madness.

You will have the ability to run, jump, swim, fly, control time, use and override portals, as you embark on the mission to free everyone and escape the cyber realm.

Deviant-X is a 2D vertical-scrolling puzzle platforming adventure that explores this Deviants vs AI saga.

Developed by Zerocape Studios - a small independent studio from Akure, Nigeria.
2186030.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
